form.formComment: Resuming today after four months. Finished off last campaign 5 of 9 starters at Leopardstown December 29 over 4123m, 4.5 len behind Walks In June with 74kg at $10. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.8 len Gowran Park October 3 over 3319m slow track defeating Los Blanco carrying 75.5kg at $3.80. Well placed here and expected to be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Resumes off a 53 day letup. Last run finished fourth of 16 runners at Naas on February 22 over 3118m, in the wet; 8 len behind Give Him A Chance with 71kg at $13. Race before finished second of 16 starters at this track on December 28 over 4828m, 1.3 len behind Joyau De Thaix with 75kg at $9. Major player.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 35 day letup. Last run finished fifth in a small field at this track on March 12 over 4626m, on a wet track; 31 len behind Rocky's Howya carrying 67kg at $23. Before that finished 11th of 14 starters at Leopardstown in the LR on February 2 over 3419m, slow track; 27 len behind Jacob's Ladder carrying 63.5kg at $101. Tougher here and will need to take another step up.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign 2 of 11 runners at Clonmel October 2 over 4023m, 5 len behind Queenofthelodge with 70kg at $7. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 5 len win. Clonmel May 15 over 3922m defeating Order Of The Dance with 71.5kg at $7. Key runner while fresh.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Freshened for 61 days. First-up after nine months finished eighth of 14 runners at Gowran Park on February 14 over 4023m, on rain affected going; 43 len behind Grimaud carrying 67.5kg at $21. Previously second-up won by 1.3 len Ballinrobe on April 11 2025 over 3419m defeating Pure Logic with 69.5kg at $3.80 in a hurdle. Freshened since last start but hard to have on last couple.
